Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Subpoenas Directed To Us Bank; Chase Bank; Jp Morgan Chase; Bank Of America; Wells Fargo Bank; American Express; Capital One And Aurora Loan Services
Off Calendar May-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Shelley Buchanan, Esq., for defendant/judgment Debtor and moving party: James Schuler
Paul P. Yound, Esq., appearing by telephone, for assignee and opposing party: Scott Kohn

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendants' and Judgment Debtors' Motion To Quash Subpoenas Directed to US Bank, Chase Bank, JP Morgan Chase, Bank Of America, Wells Fargo Bank, American Express, Capital One, And Aurora Loan Services is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion was filed on April 22, 2010. The first day this motion could have been heard is May 17, 2010, assuming there is a written agreement to accept fax service. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos. To Claim Of Exemption

MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Paul P. Yound, Esq., appearing by telephone, for assignee and moving party: Scott Kohn

After hearing, The claim of exemption is granted. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
